about.titula: Master Engineer in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
about.kratkiOpis: Master engineer in electrical engineering and computer science with experience in software development and user interface design.

intro.paragraph1: I’m a master engineer in electrical engineering and computer science with a strong interest in building well-structured software systems and thoughtfully designed user interfaces. I enjoy working across both frontend and backend, focusing on solutions that are reliable, clear, and carefully engineered from end to end.
intro.paragraph2: My background has shaped a methodical approach to problem-solving, with an emphasis on structure, maintainability, and long-term clarity. I work comfortably with both client-side and server-side development, and I enjoy understanding how systems function as a whole — from data and logic to interface and interaction.
intro.paragraph3: I’m particularly drawn to projects where engineering discipline meets clean, intentional design. Whether I’m working on application logic, APIs, or user-facing interfaces, I value consistency, performance, and attention to detail.

Contact.body: I usually respond within 24 hours. I’m open to freelance projects and long-term collaboration.

items.role: Engineer / Electrical Systems Inspection (Vessels & Floating Facilities)
items.company: Authority for Determining Vessel Seaworthiness (Ministry of Construction, Transport and Infrastructure)
items.description: I worked on inspecting and assessing the correctness of ship electrical systems and electrical installations on floating structures (houseboats/rafts). The focus was on safety, regulatory compliance, and technical documentation.
bullets: Inspection of vessel electrical systems and installations
Review of schematics and technical documentation, and verification of the as-built condition
Assessment of the safety and correctness of electrical equipment and power supply systems

items.description: I worked on developing and maintaining business applications, including desktop solutions and mobile apps. I contributed to building features from the database to the UI, as well as integrating with backend services.
bullets: Developed a WPF KDS (Kitchen Display System) application for real-time kitchen order display
Built WPF applications for table reservations and resource management (e.g., beach sunbed reservations)
Developed an Android application (Angular) for a dental clinic to manage patients and appointment scheduling
Implemented RESTful APIs for server communication (reservations, appointments, schedule overview)

items.description: During my studies, I was involved in developing software solutions and became familiar with teamwork, development processes, and real-world projects. The focus was on hands-on work and learning through practical tasks.
